specific_question: In Q2 2025, did the cybersecurity specialist at MediConn update the malware signature database across all internal endpoints supporting MediConn’s virtual healthcare platform?
answer: Yes. Between April 1 and June 30, 2025, the cybersecurity specialist at MediConn deployed automated updates to the malware signature database across 1,200 internal endpoints supporting MediConn's virtual healthcare platform.
dr_question: By Q4 2025, how can MediConn Solutions integrate the HHS Cybersecurity Performance Goals (CPGs) into its virtual healthcare platform to ensure compliance for both internal systems and third-party vendors, while effectively mitigating emerging cyber threats?
